allow: Bash(psql -U postgres -d cemis -c "SELECT email, LEFT\(password_hash, 30\) as hash_prefix FROM users;")
Bash(psql -U postgres -d cemis -t -c "SELECT email, LEFT\(password_hash, 30\) FROM users;")
PowerShell(& "psql" -U postgres -d cemis -t -c "SELECT email, LEFT\(password_hash, 30\) FROM users;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(& psql -U postgres -d cemis -t -c "SELECT email, password_hash FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@tels.unza.ac.zm';" 2>&1)
PowerShell(& psql -U postgres -d cemis -c "SELECT email, active, LEFT\(password_hash, 15\) as hash, role FROM users;" 2>&1)
Bash(psql -U postgres -d cemis -c "SELECT email, active, LEFT\(password_hash, 15\) as hash, role FROM users;")

PowerShell(node -e "try { const b = require\('bcrypt'\); b.hash\('Admin@1234', 12\).then\(h => console.log\(h\)\); } catch\(e\) { try { const b = require\('bcryptjs'\); b.hash\('Admin@1234', 12, \(e,h\) => console.log\(h\)\); } catch\(e2\) { console.log\('no bcrypt'\); } }" 2>&1)

PowerShell($end = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(45\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $log = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\chris\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\cemis-backend.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Tail 5; if \($log -match "Started|ERROR|error"\) { $log; break } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $end\))

PowerShell($end = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $log = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\chris\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\cemis-backend.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Tail 8; if \($log -match "Started CemisApplication|APPLICATION FAILED"\) { $log; break } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $end\); Write-Output "done")
